name: detectors: boundary-schema.sh exits 1 (violation) when an Express/Fastify handler reads req.body.<field> without prior schema validation (g-node-001)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "app.post(\"/x\",(req,res)=>{const v=req.body.email;res.json({v})});\n" > src/h.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/boundary-schema.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.js"
